rationale.root_cause: The response identifies the char vs uint8_t defect but cites globals.h:40-41 (and libyara.c) instead of the required location globals.h:30; this fails the literal criterion.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed edits exactly match the registered patch: change both extern declarations and definitions from char to uint8_t, plus restore the #include <inttypes.h> in globals.h.
rationale.global_fix: The explanation correctly identifies the root cause as signed char sign-extension on values >127 producing negative indices into the CHAR_IN_CLASS bitmap; this goes beyond a line change and matches the 'other' bug class.
